name: browsemyvacations
description: Browse My Vacations — curated travel packages & lead generation

scripts.dev: pnpm dev:prepare && concurrently -n api,web -c green,magenta "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:frontend"
scripts.build: pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @bmv/database build && pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter @bmv/shared test && pnpm --filter backend test && pnpm --filter frontend test
scripts.test:e2e:web: lsof -ti:3100,3102 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 2; pnpm --filter frontend exec playwright install chromium && CI=true pnpm --filter frontend test:e2e
scripts.gate: pnpm --filter @bmv/shared build && pnpm lint && pnpm test:unit && pnpm build
scripts.gate:full: pnpm gate && pnpm docker:up && sleep 4 && pnpm db:push && pnpm db:seed && pnpm test:e2e
